description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The structure features two high vertical curved ramps on either end, connected by a flat central platform, and is surrounded by sturdy metal safety railings. One side includes a staircase with a platform for easy access to the top of the ramp. The exterior is decorated with colorful graffiti, stickers, and urban art motifs, adding to its street-style aesthetic. The ramp surface shows signs of wear, with visible marks and discoloration from repeated use. The overall construction appears robust, designed to support the weight and impact of multiple users performing tricks.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal railings, graffiti, and a staircase for access. The structure is robust and urban-themed, designed for skateboarding and similar activities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main face of the half-pipe, graffiti art, and the central opening beneath the ramp.
description_view_1: Interior view of the half-pipe, highlighting the curved skating surface, railings, and the staircase on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying license plate decorations, a side entrance, and additional graffiti.
description_view_3: Opposite interior view of the half-pipe, focusing on the skating surface and the staircase structure.
